caption: Armor and mount are now typed loadout objects: a selected cavalry regiment's stat sheet names its panoply -- 'Lorica squamata: protection 40%, 13 kg' and 'Warhorse: mass +1.5, pace 8.5 m/s' -- alongside the existing weapon/shield rows, with combat reading protection and contact mass through the same interned registry (values bit-identical to the old hard-coded scalars).
